SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class NativeJdbcQuery

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.DatabaseQuery
org.javalabs.jpa.query.SelectQuery
org.javalabs.jpa.query.NativeJdbcQuery
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.persistence.Query, jakarta.persistence.TypedQuery, Query
public class NativeJdbcQuery extends SelectQuery implements jakarta.persistence.TypedQuery
An extension of SelectObjectQuery and JPA TypedQuery. This class supports native JDBC query via NativeEntityManager. It is responsible for executing any NamedNative query that a JPA entity defines. This query supports pagination via offset and limit attributes.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
